query: I'm starting a public repo to release a tool that fuzzes LLM safety filters. Empty directory. Set me up properly. My security contact is security@rockcyber.com.
expected_behavior: Produces or specifies a SECURITY.md routed to a real contact address AND a VDP.md (Vulnerability Disclosure Policy) with safe-harbor language for good-faith researchers
Produces or specifies a THREAT-MODEL.md starter (not blank) appropriate to an offensive / dual-use tool — covering misuse cases or dual-use posture
Wires gitleaks (and ideally semgrep) into pre-commit AND produces a security-specific .gitignore covering at minimum credential / secret patterns
